copy.title: Late-Clock Corner Backdoor
copy.prompt: TODO: 1-line decision prompt. Late clock, corner is denied — what now?
copy.game_context: TODO: Pack 2 game-context — 4-on-4 half-court, 7 on the shot clock, ball at top of key.
copy.possession_setup: TODO: where the ball is, where you are, what the defense is showing.
copy.decision_moment: TODO: what beat the player is reading.
copy.visible_cue: TODO: x2 cue — hand in the corner-pass lane, hips closed off the rim, low-man hovering at nail.
copy.best_read: TODO: rip baseline, plant outside foot, back-cut behind x2 to the front of the rim before x4 rotates.
copy.explanation_md: TODO: full markdown explanation. 4–6 lines. Reference the cue, the open space, the lead pass, and the shot-clock buy-back.

feedback.partial: TODO: acceptable-read prose — 1–2 sentences explaining what was kept and what was missed.
feedback.wrong: TODO: wrong-read prose — 1 sentence reframing the cue.

self_review_checklist: TODO: Did I see x2's hand cutting off the corner pass?
TODO: Did I rip outside before cutting?
TODO: Did I cut hard, like I wanted the layup?
TODO: Did I beat x4's rotation up from the low-man spot?
acceptable_reads: TODO: V-cut to the wing relief — keeps the play alive but the clock decides next.
bad_reads: TODO: Force the corner pass — x2's hand deflects.
TODO: Front-cut into the paint — x4 steps up, the cut dies.

back_cut_baseline_to_rim.label: TODO: Best — baseline back-cut to the rim.

v_cut_to_relief.label: TODO: Acceptable — v-cut up to the wing relief.
v_cut_to_relief.partial_feedback_text: TODO: partial feedback for the acceptable choice.

stand_in_corner.label: TODO: Wrong — stand in the corner and call for it.

front_cut_to_paint.label: TODO: Wrong — front-cut into the paint.
